fusee 0.13.0+e2ceecc95bf66651d1ded54de74a9fbc115a60a4
Copyright 2013-2022

  install        Sets up file association for .fus and .fuz files as well as a
                 custom uri handler for 'fusee://'.

  pack           Packs a compiled Fusee-App into one .fuz-File.

  player         Plays given Fusee-App.

  publish        Packs a FUSEE app together with its dependencies and a player
                 into a folder for deployment to a specific platform.

  protoschema    Output the protobuf schema for the .fus file format.

  help           Display more information on a specific command.

  version        Display version information.

  -o, --output      Path to the directory where to place the deployment package
                    files.

  -i, --input       Path to the DLL containing the FUSEE app to be deployed (DLL
                    must contain a class derived by RenderCanvas).

  -p, --platform    Required. Platform the deployment packages is meant to run
                    on. Possible values are: Desktop or Web.

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.

staticCommands.name: install
staticCommands.description: Sets up file association for .fus and .fuz files as well as a custom uri handler for 'fusee://'.

options.description: Removes the file association for .fus and .fuz files as well as the custom uri handler for 'fusee://'.

staticCommands.name: pack
staticCommands.description: Packs a compiled Fusee-App into one .fuz-File.

values.name: Input
values.description: Path or url to .fus/.fuz file or Fusee-App .dll.

staticCommands.name: protoschema
staticCommands.description: Output the protobuf schema for the .fus file format.

options.description: Path of .proto file to be written. ".proto" extension will be added if not present.

staticCommands.name: publish
staticCommands.description: Packs a FUSEE app together with its dependencies and a player into a folder for deployment to a specific platform.

options.description: Platform the deployment packages is meant to run on. Possible values are: Desktop or Web.
Path to the DLL containing the FUSEE app to be deployed (DLL must contain a class derived by RenderCanvas).
Path to the directory where to place the deployment package files.
